items.description: Punishment for murder; whoever commits murder shall be punished with death, or imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine.
items.nature: Cognizable, Non-Bailable, Triable by Court of Session

items.description: Whoever does any act with such intention or knowledge, and under such circumstances that, if he by that act caused death, he would be guilty of murder.
items.punishment: Imprisonment up to 10 years + Fine; Life if hurt is caused
items.nature: Cognizable, Non-Bailable, Triable by Court of Session

items.description: Culpable homicide not amounting to murder; punishment includes life imprisonment or imprisonment up to 10 years and fine.
items.nature: Cognizable, Non-Bailable, Triable by Court of Session

items.description: Whoever makes any gesture, or any preparation intending or knowing it to be likely that such gesture or preparation will cause any person present to apprehend that he who makes that gesture or preparation is about to use criminal force to that person.
items.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 months or Fine up to Rs 500

items.description: Kidnapping from India or from lawful guardianship; punishable with imprisonment up to seven years and fine.
Whoever by force compels, or by any deceitful means induces, any person to go from any place.
items.punishment: Depends on the intent (e.g., murder, ransom); same as kidnapping

items.description: Taking or enticing any minor (under 16 for males, 18 for females) out of the keeping of the lawful guardian without consent.
Punishment for theft; whoever commits theft shall be punished with imprisonment up to three years, or with fine, or with both.
items.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years or Fine or Both

items.description: Theft is robbery if the offender causes or attempts to cause death, hurt, or wrongful restraint.
items.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment up to 10 years + Fine; 14 if on highway at night.

items.description: When five or more persons conjointly commit or attempt to commit a robbery.
items.punishment: Life Imprisonment or Rigorous Imprisonment up to 10 years + Fine
items.nature: Cognizable, Non-Bailable, Triable by Court of Session

items.description: Mischief by fire or explosive substance with intent to cause damage to property or destruction of a house.
Causing the destruction of property or any such change in property as destroys or diminishes its value or utility.
Whenever force or violence is used by an unlawful assembly, or by any member thereof, in prosecution of the common object.
Historically prosecuted under Murder/Rioting sections; under new laws (BNS), it is specifically addressed as murder committed by a group on grounds of race, caste, etc.
Physical contact involving unwelcome sexual overtures, demanding sexual favors, showing pornography against a person's will, or making sexually colored remarks.
items.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment up to 3 years or Fine or Both

items.description: Following a woman and contacting or attempting to contact her repeatedly despite a clear indication of disinterest; also includes monitoring her internet or electronic communication.
items.punishment: Up to 3 years for 1st conviction; Up to 5 years for subsequent.

items.description: Using words, gestures, or sounds intended to insult the modesty of a woman or intruding upon her privacy.
items.punishment: Simple imprisonment up to 3 years + Fine

items.description: Harassment of a woman by her husband or his relatives, particularly to coerce her to meet unlawful demands for property or dowry.
